title: Job Board Application
tagline: Full-Stack Job Portal with AI Resume Matching
description: A full-stack job portal with role-based access control, dynamic filtering, and an AI-powered resume-to-job matching engine — built to eliminate manual candidate screening for hiring teams.
longDescription: Built with Java Spring Boot backend featuring JWT stateless authentication, RBAC (ADMIN/CANDIDATE roles), and JPA Specification API for dynamic multi-parameter filtering (location, job type, salary range). Implemented Spring Data JPA with Hibernate ORM for MySQL persistence including @ManyToOne entity relationships, Page<T> pagination, and derived query methods. Integrated Spring AI with Anthropic Claude API for structured resume-to-job skill gap analysis. Containerised with Docker Compose and deployed via GitHub Actions CI/CD on Render. Cloudinary handles PDF resume uploads; JavaMailSender sends automated status notifications (REVIEWING/ACCEPTED/REJECTED).

title: Blog REST API
tagline: Secured RESTful Blog Platform with JWT Auth
description: A production-grade secured RESTful Blog API with JWT stateless authentication, role-based authorisation, and a React.js frontend — demonstrating clean Spring Boot architecture end-to-end.
longDescription: Designed and built a secured RESTful Blog API using Spring Boot with JWT stateless authentication, role-based authorisation (ROLE_ADMIN / ROLE_USER), and a global exception handling layer returning consistent JSON error responses. Implemented Spring Data JPA with Hibernate ORM for MySQL persistence including entity relationships, pagination (Page<T>, Pageable), and derived query methods. Built a React.js frontend with Context API for auth state management, React Router v6 for protected routes, and Axios interceptors for automatic JWT header injection and 401 token-expiry handling.

title: Codenest
description: A unified platform for real-time collaborative coding (Monaco Editor), live lectures (Mux + HLS.js), payments (Cashfree), and gamified student-teacher interaction — research paper co-authored and submitted to ITEGAM-JETIA journal.
longDescription: Architected a 7-layer scalable edtech platform featuring a modular service layer (Course, User, Payment, Media, Code Execution, Gamification, Chat services) and an API Gateway with NextAuth v5 middleware for auth, request validation, and rate-limiting. Achieved sub-100ms WebRTC sync latency across 50+ concurrent users via Nginx reverse-proxy. Used Redis to queue code submissions executed in isolated sandboxes via Judge0 API. Real-time collaborative IDE powered by Socket.IO WebSockets with conflict resolution and state broadcast. Integrated Mux HLS live streaming, Cashfree payments, CI/CD on Render, and a CDN edge network — achieving 98.9% uptime and 0.8% error rate across 1,000 test actions.
highlight: sub-100ms WebRTC latency · 50+ concurrent users · research paper

title: Hushmail
description: A decentralised anonymous platform with Solidity smart contracts on Ethereum Sepolia, enabling tamper-proof fundraising with immutable on-chain transaction history — no central authority.
longDescription: Architected with Solidity smart contracts on Ethereum Sepolia testnet. Integrated MetaMask wallet auth via Ethers.js, NextAuth.js session management, and Firebase real-time fund tracking across 100+ test transactions. Zero central authority — all fundraising logic lives on-chain. Implemented a scalable revenue model with smart-contract-enforced platform fees.

title: Polyglot Voice
description: A multilingual platform for language detection, translation, and text-to-speech across 22 languages with a trained Naive Bayes classifier achieving 95%+ real-time classification accuracy.
longDescription: Trained a Multinomial Naive Bayes classifier achieving 95%+ real-time language classification accuracy across 22 languages. Integrated Flask REST API with React.js frontend handling 500+ daily API calls. Firebase authentication and Cloudinary media storage for production-grade reliability.
